---
title: "My Awesome Paper Title"
author: "Your Name"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
---

## Abstract
This is a single-file Quarto website. 

## Methodology
You can include math like $E = mc^2$ and even your Babylon.js code here.

```{=html}
<script src="[https://cdn.babylonjs.com/babylon.js](https://cdn.babylonjs.com/babylon.js)"></script>

<canvas id="renderCanvas" style="width: 100%; height: 400px; touch-action: none; border: 1px solid #ddd; background: #f0f0f0;"></canvas>

<script>
    const canvas = document.getElementById("renderCanvas");
    const engine = new BABYLON.Engine(canvas, true);

    const createScene = function () {
        const scene = new BABYLON.Scene(engine);
        
        // Setup Camera
        const camera = new BABYLON.ArcRotateCamera("camera", Math.PI / 2, Math.PI / 4, 4, BABYLON.Vector3.Zero(), scene);
        camera.attachControl(canvas, true);
        
        // Setup Light
        const light = new BABYLON.HemisphericLight("light", new BABYLON.Vector3(1, 1, 0), scene);
        
        // Add a Box
        const box = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateBox("box", {size: 1}, scene);
        
        // Simple Animation
        scene.registerBeforeRender(function () {
            box.rotation.y += 0.01;
            box.rotation.x += 0.01;
        });

        return scene;
    };

    const scene = createScene();

    engine.runRenderLoop(function () {
        scene.render();
    });

    window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
        engine.resize();
    });
</script>
